message:
feat(fleet): implement fleet status/apply/report with session persistence (process_triage-hc7.2)

Fleet plan now persists sessions to the session store as fleet.json.
Fleet status, apply, and report load persisted sessions and produce
structured JSON output with per-host summaries, FDR budget details,
and recurring patterns. Fleet apply shows dry-run action plans with
FDR-approved/rejected kill counts.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
